creator: john.c.prather@gmail.com
text:
I have not had time to test this build but wholeheartedly approve updating
to 1.18.0.  I had stalled out trying to get 1.17.x to build on some archs
and appreciate this updated patch you were able to generate.  The patch
appears reasonable at a glance, and I am all for pushing it if it builds
happily.  Thanks!


On Fri, Feb 14, 2014 at 2:40 PM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of net-im/pidgin-sipe,
>
> Please note that PR ports/186783 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/186783
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>
